channel.title: admin on Matt's Experience
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Matt's Experience

item.description: Matthew Stanley is a Mechanical Engineer with a focus in system controls, object detection, and machine learning. He received his undergraduate degree at Gonzaga University in the Fall of 2018. He is expected to obtain his masters degree from Colorado School of Mines in the Fall of 2019. His most recent works involve consulting work at Harbor Electronics and Vigilant Solutions. Matthew is working on the DARPA Subt. Challenge for the Colorado School of Mines team with a focus on the object detection algorithm.
